title: Adult Zombies Only
description: Replace all baby zombies and similar with adults! Toggleable
body:
Adult Zombies Only is a data pack that removes baby zombies from the game completely!\
Lots of people hate baby zombies because they are so fast and hard to hit, and it's just annoying.\
This pack removes baby zombies completely, and not just normal baby zombies, but also baby husks, drowneds, zombified piglins and zombie villagers!\
To toggle it, just type /reload and press either disable or enable or type /function azo:enable or /function azo:disable.\
Example of the pack working, using the command to summon a baby zombie (/summon minecraft:zombie ~ ~ ~ {IsBaby:1b}\
![Adult Zombies Only](https://i.imgur.com/EXnQKYe.gif)\
Enjoy!
